user.title: Smart EV Trip Planner Setup
user.description: Connect your Home Assistant Calendar and EV sensors. A Google Maps API key is required to calculate real driving distances to your calendar event locations.

data_description.calendar_entity: The calendar to monitor for upcoming events with locations.
data_description.battery_entity: Sensor reporting your EV's current battery percentage.
data_description.range_entity: Sensor reporting your EV's current estimated range (km or mi).
data_description.buffer_percent: Extra range margin added on top of the trip distance.
data_description.routing_mode: How tomorrow's total driving distance is calculated. Sequential assumes you drive between events without returning home. Round trip assumes you return home between every event.
data_description.google_maps_api_key: API key from Google Cloud Console. Requires the Distance Matrix API to be enabled.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect — check your network or calendar entity.
error.invalid_sensor: Could not read value from the selected EV sensor.
error.invalid_api_key: Google Maps API key was rejected. Check it is valid and the Geocoding API is enabled.

abort.already_configured: Smart EV Trip Planner is already configured.
